headline: This Week In E-Commerce - AI Collaboration Boosts Team Efficiency and Customer Experience
summary: Cint has announced an expanded collaboration with Salesforce to enhance AI-powered support through Slack, their cloud-based team communication platform. The collaboration aims to streamline operations by enabling teams to manage accounts and conduct go-to-market activities directly within Slack. The first phase has introduced an AI suite...
